recommendations.title: Monolith
recommendations.overview: A mother and her son plan a surprise visit to Los Angeles to see her husband/his father. Halfway there they get into a terrible accident in the middle of nowhere and now must fight to survive.

recommendations.title: Less Than Zero
recommendations.overview: A college freshman returns to Los Angeles for Christmas at his ex-girlfriend's request, but discovers that his former best friend has an out-of-control drug habit.

recommendations.title: Detour
recommendations.overview: The life of Al Roberts, a pianist in a New York nightclub, turns into a nightmare when he decides to hitchhike to Los Angeles to visit his girlfriend.

recommendations.title: Blood and Bone
recommendations.overview: In Los Angeles, an ex-con takes the underground fighting world by storm in his quest to fulfill a promise to a dead friend.

recommendations.title: Like Father
recommendations.overview: When a workaholic young executive is left at the altar, she ends up on her Caribbean honeymoon cruise with the last person she ever expected: her estranged and equally workaholic father. The two depart as strangers, but over the course of a few hilar

recommendations.title: Lowriders
recommendations.overview: A young street artist in East Los Angeles is caught between his father's obsession with lowrider car culture, his ex-felon brother and his need for self-expression.

recommendations.title: Amateur Night
recommendations.overview: Guy Carter, an insecure expectant father unable to find work in his field, accepts a job driving hookers around Los Angeles. One long and crazy evening proves to our hero that he is, in fact, up to the task of fatherhood.

recommendations.title: Get Out
recommendations.overview: Chris and his girlfriend Rose go upstate to visit her parents for the weekend. At first, Chris reads the family's overly accommodating behavior as nervous attempts to deal with their daughter's interracial relationship, but as the weekend progresses,

recommendations.title: Lost in London
recommendations.overview: Within the course of a night, Woody Harrelson finds himself in a misadventure in London that winds him up in prison.

recommendations.title: The Last Boy Scout
